mechanism_hint: a founder-guided review of sales messaging, offer structure, and buyer objections

evidence_items.summary: Founders want more qualified conversations and less generic agency language.
quotes: I need to know exactly what gets done before I trust the process.
candidate_pains: Buyers do not understand what gets done.
candidate_outcomes: Qualified conversations with the right buyers.

evidence_items.summary: Owners want proof and real examples before they commit.
quotes: Show me the process, not just the promise.
candidate_pains: Buyers are tired of vague promises.
candidate_outcomes: Confidence to book a serious conversation.
candidate_objections: They worry the work will be generic.
